items.caption: A visual metaphor for health insurance. a brown burlap sack, symbolizing the concept of health insurance, is placed on a gray surface. the sack is adorned with the words "health insurance" in bold black letters. a red heart, representing love and care, is positioned in front of the sack. to the left of the sack, a stethoscope lies, indicating the medical aspect of health insurance. scattered around the sack are coins, suggesting the financial aspect of health insurance. the overall composition of the image conveys the importance of health insurance in maintaining one's well-being.
